case_title: GEOVANA ALTAMIRANO ET AL VS. GATEWAY TRANSPORATION, LLC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY ALTAMIRANO, GEOVANA ALTAMIRANO, MARCO GATEWAY TRANSPORATION, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF AUG-28-2018 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF'S GEOVANA & MARCO ALTAMIRANO ARE PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL PHILIP GREEN. DEFENDANT GATEWAY TRANSPORTATION LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TERRY GREEN, C.O.O. RESPONDENT & APPELLANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA KRUZE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ALTAMIRANO, GEOVANA ALTAMIRANO, MARCO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GATEWAY TRANSPORATION, LLC. $2,940.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,015.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

PHILLIP GREEN, FOR RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF'S GEOVANA ALTAMIRANO & MARCO ALTAMIRANO, WHO ARE ALSO PRESENT, WITH WITNESS BETTY GRUNO.

APPELLANT/DEFENDANT GATEWAY TRANSPORTATION, LLC, IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TERRY GREEN, C.O.O, WITH WITNESS RICHARD COLLINS.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

GEOVANA ALTAMIRANO, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HER OWN BEHALF. MARCO ALTAMIRANO, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HIS OWN BEHALF. WITNESS, BETTY GRUNO, DID NOT TESTIFY.
THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

EXHIBIT A - 15 COLOR PHOTOS DEPICTING PROPERTY FENCE, PROPERTY GROUNDS & PARKED BUSES.

EXHIBIT B - AN UNSIGNED ESTIMATE WORK ORDER FROM LOPEZ QUALITY CONSTRUCTION

GATEWAY TRANSPORTATION, LLC, APPELLANT/DEFENDANT, EMPLOYEE REPRESENTATIVE TERRY GREEN C.O.O.TESTIFIES ON THEIR BEHALF.

WITNESS/EMPLOYEE RICHARD COLLINS, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT/DEFENDANT GATEWAY TRANSPORTATION, LLC. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

EXHIBIT 1 - FIVE PAGE DOCUMENT CONSISTING OF THREE PHOTOS OF HOUSE/FENCE, ONE PAGE IMAGE OF A COMPLAINT DATA SHEET FROM SF.GOV & ONE PAGE OF MULTIPLE BLACK/WHITE IMAGES OF PROPERTY SITE, PARKED BUSES

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT: DIANA KRUZE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Judgment Entered
